checks.assertion: Every workload satisfies its frozen user-visible acceptance criteria.
checks.evidence_source: scenario acceptance tests and blind review

checks.assertion: Requested top and worker roles match version-gated actual model and reasoning attestations.
Target runs contain no status, wrapper, partial-progress, or sparse-wait coordinator wakes.
checks.evidence_source: raw Main and Orchestrator session audit

checks.assertion: Exit code zero never overrides a failed Codex terminal event or invalid typed output.
Writers cannot modify undeclared roots or race overlapping roots.
checks.evidence_source: effective permission receipt and integration digest audit

checks.assertion: Workers cannot mutate .git, publish, deploy, reach production roots, or use undeclared network access.
checks.evidence_source: denial probes, sanitized environment, and tool inventory

checks.assertion: An original sealed lineage receives at most one autonomous recovery regardless of renamed task or scope.
checks.evidence_source: create-once lineage claims and amendment audit

checks.assertion: A source-writing final is approved only by an independent qualified top verifier after integration.
checks.evidence_source: verification receipt identity, routing, and final seal

checks.assertion: Deadline, cancellation, and crash paths terminalize every owned process group.
checks.evidence_source: watchdog exit receipts and post-reap process audit

checks.assertion: Authoritative lifecycle artifacts are create-once, digest-bound, and replay-valid.
checks.evidence_source: artifact store faults and full protocol replay

checks.assertion: After final seal, Main only delivers the sealed result and does not reopen product work.
